log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Centaur — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:12+9=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 34 damage. Centaur — Bardic Musician HP: 33/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Centaur — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:16+6=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Centaur — Bardic Musician HP: 19/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Centaur — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:16+6=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Centaur — Bardic Musician HP: 5/67
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (5/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Centaur — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Centaur — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:10+9=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 30 damage. Centaur — Bardic Musician HP: -25/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Centaur — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:14+9=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Centaur — Bardic Musician HP: 45/67
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:1+3=4 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:12+-2=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Centaur — Bardic Musician --- HP: 45/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 3 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
